headline: NVIDIA Vera CPU Shipments Test Investor Expectations On Agentic AI Growth
summary: NVIDIA has started shipping its new Vera CPU platform to customers including Anthropic, OpenAI, Oracle Cloud Infrastructure, and SpaceXAI. The Vera launch marks NVIDIA’s move into custom CPUs for agentic AI, alongside its existing GPU and software offerings. Enterprise rollouts such as Blue Yonder’s Model Training Factory and Dell’s Deskside Agentic AI highlight real production use of NVIDIA’s agentic AI stack. NVIDIA (NasdaqGS:NVDA) is extending its reach beyond GPUs into custom CPUs, and...
